pages.title: Coating, Not Forging
pages.text: The Lapidary Table coats an existing part; it does not forge a standalone gem part from a pattern.$(p)$(bold)Coating order:$()$(li)Forge the metal part$(li)Heat that part$(li)Place it as the base$(li)Add the required gems$(li)Work it with the Gem Cutter's Knife

pages.title: Abrasives and Output
pages.text: $(bold)Abrasives$()$(br)Some gems require an abrasive tier. Diamond Powder satisfies the built-in diamond tier and can improve quality.$(p)$(bold)Finished part$()$(br)The part keeps its metal base internally and gains a gem coating. Both materials remain part of the calculated result.
